codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Algo deu errado. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect para server. Please check your internet connection e try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long para respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection e try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts com newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields e try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Algo deu errado while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect para server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please atualizar e try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return para rastreamento e try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not salvar your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment e try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An erro occurred while carregando this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-mail ou senha. Please check your details e try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please selecionar a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Entrar again para continuar.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mail is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid ou expired
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_LOAD_FAILED: Não foi possível carregar Início summary
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Não foi possível salvar admission record. Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some obrigatório admission details are missing. Please revisar highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable para generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still revisar e salvar admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Não foi possível carregar admission form. Verifique sua conexão e tente novamente
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Não foi possível salvar local admission draft. Please try again

capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write Função.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are na fila com structured fields only e sync when connectivity returns.

privacy.title: Privacidade
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences e session data are stored only on this device. Semthing is sent para external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent para configured services.

about.title: Sobre
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype para reference e training. Semt para clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support e advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, ou determine ventilador Configurações.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against paciente, your unidade workflow, e local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Obrigatório before continuing para clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device e will be sincronizado when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Revisar safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data e uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible para paciente care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in unidade context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active unidade e Função shown by your session. Keep records within correct unidade workflow e follow local escalation, revisar, e approval procedures.

inputs.title: Digiteing inputs
inputs.body: Use Admitir para digite available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Opcional ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing opcional data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a salvar blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations mostrar advisory ventilador setting references com a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align com your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only e verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitoramento e alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a Recomendação, use Monitoramento para log vitals e labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds e should be assessed according para local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Admitir, advisory summaries, monitoramento) works offline. Data is saved locally. Opcional AI features require connectivity. When voltar online, continuar as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume e oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory para expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Volume corrente (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, e pH, tied para a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance e verification state para a reference range. Only active approved ou verified ranges are eligible para active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need revisar before dataset ou training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue para revisar decisions, corrections, exclusions, e audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, ou syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden de normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; digite SpO₂ e outro vitals when available. para better matching, adicionar PaO₂, PaCO₂, e pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Admitir, advisory summaries, e monitoramento work offline. Data is stored locally. Opcional AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not obrigatório para core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, pendente, retired, rejected, e unverified ranges are not eligible para active decision-support display. Revisar source, version, scope, e verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness ajuda is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness e shadow-mode details are visible only para approved governance roles. Semrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs revisar
needsReview.body: Use revisar queue para check submitted data, request correction, aprovar eligible records, ou excluir records com an audit motivo.

guides.home: Revisar unidade context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, e records needing revisar before opening a paciente workflow.
guides.admit: Capture paciente pathway e available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly e revisar backend-confirmed calculations after salvar.
guides.tracking: Use rastreamento para scan recent ventilation status e revisar needs. Read trend flags com source data e local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture para de-identified candidate records. Human revisar is obrigatório before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use revisar queue para aprovar, request correction, ou excluir records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards para aggregate quality, revisar, reference, e governance status. Avoid paciente identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use Configurações para conta, unidade, accessibility, privacidade, sync, e reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Revisar FiO₂ e PEEP; consider recruitment; check para shunt ou V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Revisar minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation e perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols e clinical judgment.

ai.label: Suporte à decisão por IA
ai.enableHint: Use online AI para complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture paciente pathway, idade, body metrics, e motivo para support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, e uncertain values. Ventilador Configurações are suggested on Próximo step de dataset.

saveReview.description: Revisar e editar dataset-suggested ventilador Configurações, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override motivo when needed, revisar status, e sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nome–value pair. Opcional; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Nome

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs ou outro metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used para trend analysis e monitoramento after you start session. Opcional; you can adicionar points later on monitoramento screen.
